title: Caught a major market move today—up $7.9k Heres the breakdown
author: Fast-Swimming3254
selftext:
Had an interesting trading session today

Managed to catch a strong move in the market and ended up +$7.9k on the day Still refining my approach but heres roughly what contributed

Focused on short-term volatility 

Let the system signal entries instead of forcing trades

 Cut losers quicker than usual still working on this

Definitely not a perfect system—I had drawsdowns before so still treating this as a learning process

Curious how others here handle days like this do you scale up or stay consistent with size?
